# Sovrium

> A self-hosted, configuration-driven application platform. Define your entire app — data models, auth, pages, themes, analytics — in a single YAML/JSON file.

Sovrium turns declarative configuration into production-ready applications with built-in authentication (Better Auth), PostgreSQL database (Drizzle ORM), server-side rendered pages, and privacy-friendly analytics. No vendor lock-in, no telemetry, full source available.

## Docs

- [Full LLM Reference](https://sovrium.com/llms-full.txt): Complete documentation for LLMs (~2100 lines)
- [JSON Schema](https://sovrium.com/schemas/0.1.0/app.schema.json): Machine-readable JSON Schema (Draft-07)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/sovrium/sovrium): Source code repository
- [License](https://github.com/sovrium/sovrium/blob/main/LICENSE.md): Business Source License 1.1

### Get Started

- [Introduction](https://sovrium.com/en/docs): What is Sovrium, why use it, how it works
- [Installation](https://sovrium.com/en/docs/installation): Prerequisites (Bun 1.0+), global/project install, database setup
- [Quick Start](https://sovrium.com/en/docs/quick-start): Two paths — YAML + CLI or TypeScript + Bun — from zero to running app

### App Schema Reference

- [Schema Overview](https://sovrium.com/en/docs/overview): 10 root properties, minimal config, progressive complexity
- [Tables & Fields](https://sovrium.com/en/docs/tables): Data models, 41 field types in 9 categories, RBAC permissions, indexes
- [Theme](https://sovrium.com/en/docs/theme): Design tokens — colors, fonts, spacing, shadows, animations, breakpoints, borderRadius
- [Pages & Components](https://sovrium.com/en/docs/pages): Server-rendered pages, 62 component types, SEO metadata, interactions, $ref templates
- [Authentication](https://sovrium.com/en/docs/auth): Strategies (email/password, magic link, OAuth), roles, 2FA, email templates
- [Languages](https://sovrium.com/en/docs/languages): Multi-language support, $t: translation syntax, RTL support
- [Analytics](https://sovrium.com/en/docs/analytics): Privacy-friendly, cookie-free, configurable retention and session tracking

### Resources

- [API Reference](https://sovrium.com/en/docs/api-reference): Interactive OpenAPI documentation (Scalar)
- [Resources](https://sovrium.com/en/docs/resources): JSON Schema, LLM references, schema explorer, GitHub

## Quick Start

### Prerequisites

- [Bun](https://bun.sh) 1.0+ (JavaScript/TypeScript runtime)
- PostgreSQL (required for tables and auth; not needed for static sites)

### Install

```bash
# Global CLI
bun add -g sovrium

# Or as project dependency
bun add sovrium
```

### Minimal Config (app.yaml)

```yaml
name: my-app
```

### With Data Tables

```yaml
name: my-app

tables:
  - id: 1
    name: tasks
    fields:
      - id: 1
        name: title
        type: single-line-text
        required: true
      - id: 2
        name: status
        type: single-select
        options:
          - label: To Do
            color: gray
          - label: In Progress
            color: blue
          - label: Done
            color: green

auth:
  strategies:
    emailPassword: true

theme:
  colors:
    primary: "#3b82f6"
```

### Run

```bash
# YAML + CLI
sovrium start app.yaml

# TypeScript + Bun
bun run index.ts
```

### TypeScript Alternative

```typescript
import { start } from 'sovrium'

await start({
  name: 'my-app',
  tables: [
    {
      id: 1,
      name: 'tasks',
      fields: [
        { id: 1, name: 'title', type: 'single-line-text', required: true },
      ],
    },
  ],
})
```

## Schema Reference

The app schema has 10 root properties:

- `name` (required): App identifier (npm naming conventions)
- `version`: SemVer version string
- `description`: Single-line app description
- `tables`: Data model with 41 field types, relationships, permissions
- `theme`: Design tokens (colors, fonts, spacing, shadows, animations, breakpoints, borderRadius)
- `pages`: Server-rendered pages with 62 component types, SEO metadata, i18n
- `auth`: Authentication strategies (email/password, magic link, OAuth), roles, 2FA
- `languages`: Multi-language support with $t: translation syntax
- `components`: Reusable UI templates with $ref and $variable substitution
- `analytics`: Privacy-friendly, cookie-free analytics

- [Vision](https://github.com/sovrium/sovrium/blob/main/VISION.md): Product vision and roadmap
- [Trademark](https://github.com/sovrium/sovrium/blob/main/TRADEMARK.md): Trademark usage guidelines
